title: microchilus canarensis
intro: Microchilus canarensis, also known as the Indian root or Kanchanar tree, is a plant species in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microchilus canarensis include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Microchilus canarensis include teas, decoctions, and powder made from the roots and bark, which are used to treat various health conditions.
